items.name: Vivid Pink Soft Cloud Blurry Blush
items.description: Vivid Pink Soft Cloud Blurry Blush gives your avatar a gentle, diffused glow with a dreamy finish. Featuring vivid pink tones blended into a cloud-like blur, this blush creates a natural, airy look that feels light, fresh, and effortlessly pretty.

items.name: Warm Orange Cloud Blurry Blush
items.description: Warm Orange Cloud Blurry Blush gives your avatar a gentle, diffused glow with a dreamy finish. Featuring warm orange tones blended into a cloud-like blur, this blush creates a natural, airy look that feels light, fresh, and effortlessly pretty.
